headline: Board-to-Board Connectors Market Size to Hit USD 21.3 Billion by 2035 | Research by SNS Insider
summary: The United States Board-to-Board Connectors Market is forecasted to grow at an annual rate of 5.49%, reaching a valuation of USD 5.1 Billion by 2035, compared to USD 3.0 Billion in 2025, driven by increasing application across semiconductor manufacturing, automotive electronics, aerospace and defense, healthcare technology, and high-performance computing sectors, alongside advancements made by leading companies like TE Connectivity, Amphenol, and Molex.
